title: Pogo Man
description: Charge double jumps to clear city traffic, build combos, and chase a high score in a one-button 3D arcade run.

prompt.objective: Create a side-view pogo arcade runner with automatic hops, double jumps, traffic, combos, and scores.

mintAssets.brief: Connected side-profile rider and pogo stick with fixed hands and feet.
Three vehicles, tall buildings, a seamless dark road, and parallax clouds.
Urban arcade loop plus pogo, crash, and clear cues.

experience: Use automatic rebounds and two immediate jumps per landing.
Clear safe-spaced traffic, score combos, save the best score, and restart.
prompt.visualDirection: Warm toy-diorama city, cobalt sky, rounded PBR forms, and crisp side silhouettes.

thumbnail.alt: A stylized rider bounces on a pogo stick over yellow and coral cars on a colorful city street.

social.title: Pogo Man
social.description: Charge double jumps to clear city traffic, build combos, and chase a high score in a one-button 3D arcade run.

image.alt: A stylized rider bounces on a pogo stick over yellow and coral cars on a colorful city street.
